A short, repeatable review every deliverable passes before it ships."}]}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"alt":"","fileID":"","originalSrc":"","src":"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/AI-Marketing-Hub/classroom-assets@cfc5a1e99148d256bff96912f16ee28322523f56/chat-cf-edit.gif","title":""}},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Ask how to keep weak work from shipping and Claude pulls the five-box QA check."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The QA checklist (run on every deliverable)"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"True."},{"type":"text","text":" Every stat and claim is real and sourced. Verify it."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"On-brand."},{"type":"text","text":" Voice matches the client. No hype, no filler, sounds like them."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"On-target."},{"type":"text","text":" It serves the \"win\" you pinned in Plan, not just word count."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Technically clean."},{"type":"text","text":" Links work, schema is valid, headings make sense."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Human-checked."},{"type":"text","text":" You read it start to finish. Not just skimmed."}]}]}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Let the tools help you check"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/blog"},{"type":"text","text":" quality gates flag thin or weak sections before you do."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/seo content \u003curl\u003e"},{"type":"text","text":" re-scores a page after edits so you see the lift."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Fact-check pass: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"Verify every statistic and claim in content/\u003cfile\u003e and flag anything you can't source."}]}]}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The one rule"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Nothing ships unread."},{"type":"text","text":" The fastest way to lose a client is one fabricated stat or one off-brand sentence with their name on it. The review is cheap. The cleanup isn't."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"You're done when:"},{"type":"text","text":" the deliverable passes all five boxes and you'd happily put your own name on it."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"💡 Build a tiny "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"qa.md"},{"type":"text","text":" in the client folder with these five boxes. Tick them per deliverable. It turns \"I think it's fine\" into \"it passed.\""}]}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"✅ Run the checklist on the thing you drafted last lesson. Post the one issue it caught. (There's almost always one.)"}]}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Edit is the step people skip and the one that protects your name."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Five boxes: true, on-brand, on-target, technically clean, human-checked."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Nothing ships unread. Use the quality gates, but you make the final call."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/d2605b58?md=89d92e3fde4e4320acdfd6f9c1bbb583","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"italic"}],"text":"The Client Delivery Flow"},{"type":"text","text":" · Next: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/d2605b58?md=e5120105f8624b52807c53946f979dcb","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"📈 Improve: Report \u0026 Retainer"}]}]

modules.name: f98020b6
modules.title: Your first prompt
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Talk to Claude Code like a teammate: say the outcome you want and any rules (\"match my brand colors\"). Before it touches anything, hit "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Shift+Tab"},{"type":"text","text":" to reach "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Plan mode"},{"type":"text","text":" - Claude researches and shows you a plan first, so you fix the direction before any work happens. Then approve, and choose whether it edits on its own or checks with you each step."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Plan mode is reading the recipe before you turn on the stove. Cheaper to fix on paper than in the pan."}]}]}]

modules.name: 94403a46
modules.title: The claude.md file
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"The CLAUDE.md File (Brief Claude Once)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"CLAUDE.md is a file Claude reads automatically every session, so you stop re-explaining yourself. Put your brand voice, who you sell to, your offer, and your rules in it once. Run "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"/init"},{"type":"text","text":" to generate a starter, trim it to the essentials, and whenever you correct Claude say \"save this to memory.\""}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Think of it this way:"},{"type":"text","text":" It's onboarding a new hire. Write the brief once, and they show up knowing your business every day after."}]}]}]

modules.name: 51cc67f3
modules.title: Context Management
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Context (Why It Gets Dumber, And The Fix)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Everything you do fills Claude's memory, and when it fills up, the answers get worse. Same task but slowing down? Run "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"/compact"},{"type":"text","text":" to keep the gist and free up space. Starting something new and unrelated? Run "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"/clear"},{"type":"text","text":" for a clean slate. Want to see what's eating memory? "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"/context"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Think of it this way:"},{"type":"text","text":" It's a whiteboard. /compact wipes it down to the summary, /clear wipes it blank. Don't start a new plan on yesterday's scribbles."}]}]}]

modules.name: f7d2529a
modules.title: Explore, plan, code, commit
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Explore → Plan → Code → Commit (The One Rhythm)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"This is the loop for every task: let Claude "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"explore"},{"type":"text","text":" (read and research), review its "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"plan"},{"type":"text","text":", let it "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"run"},{"type":"text","text":" the work while it checks itself, then "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"review and ship"},{"type":"text","text":". Most people skip straight to \"run\" and pay for it in do-overs. Tell it exactly what \"done\" looks like and the first result usually lands."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Think of it this way:"},{"type":"text","text":" Measure twice, cut once. The plan is the measuring."}]}]}]

modules.name: 3322515c
modules.title: MCP
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"MCP (Plug In Your Tools)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"MCP connects Claude Code to outside tools and data — analytics, docs, services like DataForSEO — and Claude reaches for them when a task needs them. Manage them with "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"/mcp"},{"type":"text","text":": see what's on, switch off what you're not using. Every connected tool quietly eats memory even when idle, so keep only what you need."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Think of it this way:"},{"type":"text","text":" They're browser tabs. A few open is fine; forty open and everything crawls."}]}]}]

modules.title: ✍️ Claude Blog
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Claude Blog turns "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/708c1575?md=f579fae5e640447f90c73fb4ee8ed75f","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"Claude Code"},{"type":"text","text":" into a full blog engine. You run one command. It researches, drafts, adds schema, links internally, makes a hero image, and fact-checks every stat. The output is built to do two jobs at once: rank on Google and get cited by AI engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI Overviews."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"It's 30 sub-skills and 5 agents behind one "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/blog"},{"type":"text","text":" command. modules.name: b2f836c7
modules.title: What is Codex
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"What Is "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HFM3se4lNiw","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Codex"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"? (An Agent That Checks Its Own Work)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Codex is OpenAI's coding agent that lives in your terminal, IDE, and app — it's not a chatbot. You give it a task and it plans, does the work, then "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"validates itself"},{"type":"text","text":": runs tests, launches the app, checks the logs. So when it says \"done,\" it's usually done — not a pile of errors waiting for you."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Think of it this way:"},{"type":"text","text":" A contractor who doesn't just build the deck — they jump on it a few times before handing you the keys."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Coming from Claude Code?"},{"type":"text","text":" Same agentic loop, different engine."},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Read more →"},{"type":"text","text":" "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli"}]}]

modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"This video is the full tour — it covers both the Codex app and the command line, start to finish. To get running right now: install the CLI with one command and launch with "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"codex"},{"type":"text","text":", or download the Codex app and sign in. Either way, you sign in with your ChatGPT account."}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"curl -fsSL https://chatgpt.com/codex/install.sh | sh   # CLI (macOS / Linux)\ncodex                                                  # launch in your project"}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Think of it this way:"},{"type":"text","text":" The app is the dashboard, the CLI is the cockpit. Same engine — pick your seat."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Coming from Claude Code?"},{"type":"text","text":" Same \"run it in your project\" flow; just swap the install URL."},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Read more →"},{"type":"text","text":" "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"https://developers.openai.com/codex/cli"}]}]

modules.name: 08b362b9
modules.title: Codex App
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Meet the Codex App (Your Command Center)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The Codex app gives you one place to run and supervise agents instead of juggling terminal windows — your projects on the left, a live conversation on the right. Dictate a task by voice, watch Codex work, then review the changes, leave comments, and approve when it looks right. Plug in your tools with skills, run several agents at once, and hand long jobs to the cloud."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Think of it this way:"},{"type":"text","text":" Mission control. Every agent and project on one screen — you just supervise."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Coming from Claude Code?"},{"type":"text","text":" It's the GUI cousin of the terminal, same agent underneath."},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Read more →"},{"type":"text","text":" "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://developers.openai.com/codex","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"https://developers.openai.com/codex"}]}]

modules.name: ad6a2550
modules.title: /goal
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Hand Off Big Jobs (Goals)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Type "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/goal"},{"type":"text","text":", state a concrete, checkable outcome, and Codex works toward it — for hours or even days — deciding for itself when it's done. Steer it mid-run, peek at progress in a side chat without interrupting, and pause or resume when you step away. The trick: make the goal something it can "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"verify"},{"type":"text","text":" (a target hit, tests passing)."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Think of it this way:"},{"type":"text","text":" A slow cooker. [v2][{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Build a wiki vault that Codex can research into, save findings to, and answer questions from with citations. Your research stops evaporating between sessions."}]}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"🎬 "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Watch:"},{"type":"text","text":" "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://youtu.be/I2hXQ-_qzRk","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"The AI Second Brain That Actually Remembers Everything"}]}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"alt":"","fileID":"","originalSrc":"","src":"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/AI-Marketing-Hub/classroom-assets@cfc5a1e99148d256bff96912f16ee28322523f56/anim-real-codex-obsidian.gif","title":""}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"What codex-obsidian does"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"codex-obsidian is the Codex port of the Hub's Obsidian companion. The core loop: scaffold a vault, pull source material in with research, save an answer or session as a structured note, then query and retrieve from what you've saved with citations. It also lints for orphan pages and broken links, and builds visual maps and database views."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Install it"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"bash"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"codex plugin marketplace add AI-Marketing-Hub/codex-obsidian
codex plugin add codex-obsidian@ai-marketing-hub-codex-obsidian"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Run it"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Most AI work is throwaway. You get a great answer, close the window, and lose it. codex-obsidian fixes that. Every audit, research dive, and campaign note lands in a vault you own, in plain Markdown, cross-linked and searchable. Ask a follow-up next week and Codex reads the vault first, then answers from your own knowledge with citations."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Save the current work into your vault:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Save this conversation as a structured note in my Obsidian vault.
Pick the right note type, add frontmatter, file it in the correct
folder, and update the index and log."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Query what you already know:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Based on my Obsidian vault, what do I already know about my
competitor's pricing strategy? Synthesize with citations to the
source notes."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Same as the Claude version"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The standout is the research loop. Point it at a topic, it runs searches, synthesizes findings, and files structured pages straight into your vault. Then query that knowledge later. Build it once, compound it forever. Same multi-writer-safe pattern as Claude + Obsidian. For the full setup and the sub-skills, see the product course."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Set up a vault with codex-obsidian, run one research loop on a topic you care about, then post the note title (or a screenshot)."}]}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"codex-obsidian is the Hub's Obsidian companion, Codex-native."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Core loop: scaffold a vault, research into it, save notes, retrieve with citations."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Your AI work becomes a permanent, searchable, cited knowledge base."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Same multi-writer-safe pattern as Claude + Obsidian."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/ded6ca5c?md=ed1717deecdb4decb7d5bd674c0f030d","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"italic"}],"text":"The Codex Suite"},{"type":"text","text":" · Next: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/ded6ca5c?md=501195eaf4d34a8fb604d54b2ac6c03d","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"🛡️ Codex Cybersecurity"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Repo:"},{"type":"text","text":" "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://github.com/AI-Marketing-Hub/codex-obsidian","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"github.com/AI-Marketing-Hub/codex-obsidian"}]}]

[v2][{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Run a security audit on your site code, landing pages, or any repo you ship, and get a scored report covering the OWASP Top 10, leaked secrets, and risky dependencies. You don't need to be a security engineer to run it."}]}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"alt":"","fileID":"","originalSrc":"","src":"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/AI-Marketing-Hub/classroom-assets@cfc5a1e99148d256bff96912f16ee28322523f56/cover-real-codex-cyber.png","title":""}},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"🎬 "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Watch:"},{"type":"text","text":" "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://youtu.be/aE295lLPO5A","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"8 AI agents that secure your vibe-coded app"}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"What codex-cybersecurity does"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"codex-cybersecurity is the Codex port of the Hub's security audit skill. It reviews code across eight lanes at once: vulnerability detection (OWASP Top 10 and CWE Top 25), authorization checks, secret scanning (hardcoded credentials, API keys), dependency and supply-chain analysis, infrastructure-as-code, threat intelligence (malware and backdoor patterns mapped to MITRE ATT&CK), AI-generated code review, and business-logic flaws. It returns a weighted 0 to 100 score, so you know how exposed you are at a glance."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Install it"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"bash"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"codex plugin marketplace add AI-Marketing-Hub/codex-cybersecurity
codex plugin add codex-cybersecurity@ai-marketing-hub-codex-cybersecurity"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Run it"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":""Security" sounds like an engineering concern. But marketers ship code constantly. Landing pages, tracking snippets, embeds, scrappy tools, AI-generated scripts. Any of those can leak an API key or pull in a compromised dependency. This catches the three that bite marketers most: secrets committed by accident, outdated or compromised packages, and AI-generated code with subtle holes. Run it before anything goes live."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"You don't have to run the full eight-lane audit every time. Start with a quick scan, then go deep only where it flags something."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A pre-launch quick scan:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Run a quick security audit on this project: focus on hardcoded
secrets, vulnerable dependencies, and OWASP Top 10 issues. Score it
0-100 and list every finding with severity and the exact file/line."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A secrets-only sweep before pushing:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Scan this repo for hardcoded credentials, API keys, and tokens only.
Tell me what to remove or move to environment variables before I commit."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"How it works"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Eight-lane methodology with weighted scoring: OWASP and CWE review, auth checks, secrets, supply chain, IaC, threat intelligence, and business logic. Cybersecurity ships Codex-native (there's no separate Claude course page for it). A developer who wants the full breakdown of each lane can read the repo directly on GitHub."}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Run a quick codex-cybersecurity scan on any code you've shipped (a landing page, a tracking script, a small tool). Post your "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"score"},{"type":"text","text":" plus the scariest finding. Never paste the actual secret."}]}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"codex-cybersecurity is the Hub's security audit, Codex-native. Eight review lanes."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Covers OWASP Top 10, CWE Top 25, secrets, supply chain, IaC, and threat intel."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Marketers ship code too. Run it on landing pages, snippets, and AI-generated scripts."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Use the quick scan first. Go single-lane deep only where it flags."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/ded6ca5c?md=ed1717deecdb4decb7d5bd674c0f030d","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"italic"}],"text":"The Codex Suite"},{"type":"text","text":" · Next: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/ded6ca5c?md=6170f4a99a924e5e916815b715a29630","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"🎬 Codex Media"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Repo:"},{"type":"text","text":" "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://github.com/AI-Marketing-Hub/codex-cybersecurity","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"github.com/AI-Marketing-Hub/codex-cybersecurity"}]}]

modules.name: ae908341
modules.title: Lead gen with AI (n8n + Claude)
modules.desc:
[v2][{"type":"image","attrs":{"alt":"image.png","fileID":"8e6654d8857346d98d7927b864e1ac36","originalSrc":"https://assets.skool.com/f/49ff1f2d656742a68e4b871cd8c0e543/5763554ae740479dad4ecd3ac5d55cff71549077922b4f4d9388350b83000c87.png","src":"https://assets.skool.com/f/49ff1f2d656742a68e4b871cd8c0e543/5763554ae740479dad4ecd3ac5d55cff71549077922b4f4d9388350b83000c87-md.png","title":"image.png"}},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Enrichard (Google Maps) scrape + Mr. Claude to get the leads."},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"1. Run the n8n workflow (get the leads)"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"2. Make a copy of the sheets"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"3. After you process the leads, download the .csv, share into your claude and paste this prompt:"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"4. Prompt for Claude:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"# Lead Processing Prompt (Copy-Paste into Claude)

You are a lead enrichment and outreach agent. Process the attached CSV of scraped Google Maps leads through these steps in order:

## STEP 1: ENRICH LINKEDIN + EMAIL
For each business in the CSV:
- Find the decision maker / owner LinkedIn profile. Search "site:linkedin.com [business name] [city] owner" and variations.
- Find the business email. Check the company website contact page, footer, about page. Search "site:[domain] email" and "[business name] email [city]".
- If no email found on first pass, dig deeper: check BBB listings, Yelp, Facebook business pages, Chamber of Commerce, and industry directories.
- ONLY use verified emails. If a domain doesn't exist or email can't be confirmed from a public source, leave it blank.
- No generic emails (info@, contact@, service@, office@, support@). We want personal/owner emails only. Gmail, AOL, named addresses like garyp@company.com are good.

## STEP 2: VERIFY ALL DATA
- Verify every LinkedIn URL actually leads to the correct person at the correct company.
- Verify every email domain exists (DNS/MX check). Remove any with dead domains.
- Cross-reference person names on LinkedIn with the actual business. Flag mismatches but keep if person is confirmed correct.
- Remove any email you are not 95%+ confident about.

## STEP 3: WRITE ICE BREAKERS
Add 3 columns: "Ice Breaker LinkedIn", "Ice Breaker Email", "Ice Breaker Phone"

Style rules:
- Gary Vee soft tone. Warm, direct, natural, short.
- No m-dashes (--). Use periods and commas only.
- Personalize using: review count, rating, founding year, owner backstory, niche focus, number of locations, anything unique about the business.
- If no LinkedIn found, leave Ice Breaker LinkedIn blank.
- If no email found, leave Ice Breaker Email blank.
- Always write Ice Breaker Phone (we have every phone number).

The offer being pitched: SEO / Google ranking services.

LinkedIn ice breaker: Open with something personal about the owner. Reference their background. Connect it to SEO. End with "Worth connecting?"
Email ice breaker: Start with "Hey [Name]," reference the business stats or story. Pitch SEO value. End with a soft CTA.
Phone ice breaker: Start with "Hey [Name], quick one." Reference one standout stat. Pitch in one sentence. End with "Got a couple minutes?"

## STEP 4: OUTPUT
- Update the CSV with all enriched data.
- Flag the best targets: leads with personal emails (not generic), owner LinkedIn found, mid-size companies (not too big, not too small), high ratings.
- Generate a Blog Outreach Plan PDF identifying the top targets and a recommended blog topic for cold outreach.

modules.title: 📖 How to Use This Library
modules.desc: [v2][{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"What you'll be able to do:"},{"type":"text","text":" Read any prompt in this course and run it right the first time. You'll know how the bracket pattern works, when to keep a slash command, and the three context lines that lift every prompt."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Copy the prompt, swap the brackets, add three context lines, and run."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"This whole course is copy-paste. The only thing you ever change is the text inside "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"\u003cangle brackets\u003e"},{"type":"text","text":". Find your job, copy the prompt, fill the blanks, run it."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The bracket pattern"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Every prompt has placeholders that look like "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"\u003cyour site\u003e"},{"type":"text","text":" or "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"\u003ctopic\u003e"},{"type":"text","text":". Delete the brackets and type your real value. Never leave a bracket in. Claude will treat "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"\u003c \u003e"},{"type":"text","text":" as a literal instruction and stop to ask you what it means."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Quick rule: if you see "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"\u003c \u003e"},{"type":"text","text":", that part is your job."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"This:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Write a comparison page for \u003cmy product\u003e vs \u003ccompetitor\u003e aimed at \u003cbuyer type\u003e."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Becomes:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Write a comparison page for Acme CRM vs HubSpot aimed at small agency owners."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Slash command vs plain prompt"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Some prompts start with a slash command like "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/seo"},{"type":"text","text":" or "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/blog"},{"type":"text","text":". That command routes your request to the right tool. Keep it."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Other prompts are plain English with no slash. Those run in any Claude session. If a plain prompt has no slash, you can still run it inside a product (like "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/blog"},{"type":"text","text":") to give it that product's context."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The three context lines"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Before almost any prompt, three lines lift the output. Add them at the top:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Business: \u003cwhat you sell and to whom\u003e\nGoal: \u003cthe one outcome you want from this\u003e\nVoice: \u003chow it should sound, e.g. plain, expert, friendly\u003e"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Generic prompt in, generic answer out. The model can't read your mind. These three lines are how you hand it the brief."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Replace everything in "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"\u003cangle brackets\u003e"},{"type":"text","text":" with your real values. Never leave a bracket in."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Keep the slash command if a prompt has one. It routes to the right tool."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Add Business / Goal / Voice context lines to lift every prompt."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"These are starting points. Lesson 10 teaches you to build your own."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=cda1296bf09b45969c19d8ee99617010","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Prompt Library \u0026 Cheat Sheets"},{"type":"text","text":" · Next: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=1076bae928754c1d9fd107576cd6bad9","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"🔎 SEO Prompts"}]}]

modules.name: 4405593d
modules.title: 🔎 SEO Prompts
modules.desc:
[v2][{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Pair these prompts with "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/seo"},{"type":"text","text":" to audit a site, deep-dive one page, fix schema, prep for AI search, and plan keyword clusters. Each one returns a ranked fix list, not a wall of data."}]}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"alt":"","fileID":"","originalSrc":"","src":"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/AI-Marketing-Hub/classroom-assets@cfc5a1e99148d256bff96912f16ee28322523f56/chat-pl-seo.gif","title":""}},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Every prompt hands back a ranked fix list, not a wall of data."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The pattern: command + URL + context"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Most "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/seo"},{"type":"text","text":" prompts are a command, a URL, and one line of context. Tell Claude your business type and your goal and the benchmarks get sharper."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Start broad with the audit. It gives you the priority order. The single-page and schema prompts fix what it flags. Deep training lives in "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/b5886e72?md=0e87e1b9a1ea4e0ba7047bf57960939f","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"🔎 Claude SEO"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Prompts"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Full-site audit with context (your most-used prompt):"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/seo audit https://<yoursite.com>

Context: we're a <business type> selling <product> to <audience>. Our biggest goal this quarter is <goal>. Give me the score, the top 3 critical findings, and a ranked fix list I can hand to a non-technical teammate."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Single-page deep dive:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/seo page https://<yoursite.com>/<important-page>

Tell me the on-page issues, content-quality gaps, and missing schema for this exact page. Rank fixes by impact to effort so I know what to do first."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Schema detect, validate, and generate:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/seo schema https://<yoursite.com>/<page>

Show me what structured data exists, what's broken or deprecated, and generate the JSON-LD I should add. Skip any schema type Google no longer rewards."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Get cited by AI (GEO):"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/seo geo https://<yoursite.com>/<page>

Audit this page for AI-search citability across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Tell me exactly what to add so an AI quotes this page as a source."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Keyword and topic clusters:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/seo cluster <seed keyword>

Build a hub-and-spoke topic cluster around this seed. Give me the pillar page plus 6 to 10 supporting articles, each with a target keyword and the search intent behind it."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/seo audit <url>"},{"type":"text","text":" is the workhorse. modules.name: 2f261b5b
modules.title: 🧠 Research & Brain Prompts
modules.desc:
[v2][{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Run research prompts that turn raw inputs into a plan you can act on the same day. And run the full prompt members keep asking for: how to make the Marketing Brain and "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/c1d53bcf?md=22902679826f428295b66ca4141160bd","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"Local SEO Brain"},{"type":"text","text":" work on the same client without stepping on each other."}]}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"alt":"","fileID":"","originalSrc":"","src":"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/AI-Marketing-Hub/classroom-assets@cfc5a1e99148d256bff96912f16ee28322523f56/chat-pl-research.gif","title":""}},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Turn competitor and customer inputs into one plan you can act on today."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Research is advisory, so make it decide"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The Marketing Brain researches and recommends. It never touches your live accounts. So end every research prompt with a decision: not "tell me about X," but "tell me what to "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"do"},{"type":"text","text":" about X.""}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Research quality follows input quality. Paste a competitor URL, a real review, or a transcript and the output stops being generic. The full system lives in "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/c1d53bcf?md=888db513f2b24f4d85320fe80ee88bbb","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"🧠 Marketing Brain"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Prompts"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Competitor teardown:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Analyze this competitor: <competitor URL>.

Break down their positioning, who they target, their core offer and pricing logic, and the three things they do better than us. Then give me two specific angles where we can win that they've left open."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Mine the voice of the customer:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Here are real customer reviews / support messages / call notes:

<paste 5 to 15 raw quotes>

Pull out the exact phrases customers use for their problem and their desired outcome. Group them by theme, and give me the five phrases I should put in my headlines and ads word-for-word."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Build a keyword workbook:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Build a keyword workbook for a <business type> selling <product> to <audience>.

Group keywords by buying stage (problem-aware, solution-aware, ready-to-buy). For each group give me 5 to 8 keywords, the intent, and the page type that should target it."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Find the positioning angle:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Business: <what we sell and to whom>. Top competitors: <list>.

Find the single positioning angle we can own: the thing that's true for us, valued by buyers, and not already claimed by a competitor. Give me the one-sentence positioning statement and three proof points."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Merge the Brains (the one members keep asking for)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Marketing Brain finds "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"what to go after"},{"type":"text","text":". Local SEO Brain tells you "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"how to win it locally"},{"type":"text","text":". No overlap. A relay. The order is the whole trick: research first, local plan second, execution last."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Both Brains live in your "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"~/AI-Marketing-Hub"},{"type":"text","text":" folder. The client's work lives in its own folder. You point "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/708c1575?md=f579fae5e640447f90c73fb4ee8ed75f","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"Claude Code"},{"type":"text","text":" at the client folder, then run this prompt to bridge both vaults into one action plan."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"The full "merge the Marketing Brain + Local SEO Brain" prompt:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"You have two vaults available in ~/AI-Marketing-Hub:
1. Marketing Brain (research + strategy: keyword map, competitor map, demand)
2. Local SEO Brain (local execution: Google Business Profile, citations/NAP, local content, maps)

Client: <client name>. Location: <city / service area>. Niche: <what they do>.

Step 1 (read Marketing Brain): Pull the existing strategy for <client>: the keyword + competitor
map and the priority targets. If no strategy exists yet, say so and stop.

Step 2 (read Local SEO Brain): Pull the relevant chapters on Google Business Profile,
citations and NAP consistency, and local content/pages.

Step 3 (merge into one plan): Produce ONE local SEO action plan for <client> in <city>:
- What to fix first (ranked by impact to effort)
- The exact Google Business Profile changes
- The citations to build or correct (with the corrected NAP values)
- 3 local pages to write, each with a target keyword and the intent

Rules: do not invent data. Cite which vault each recommendation came from. Keep it to one page
a non-technical client could read. End with the first three actions for this week."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"After the plan exists, your skills do the work: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/seo local"},{"type":"text","text":", "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/seo maps"},{"type":"text","text":", and "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/blog write"},{"type":"text","text":" read from both vaults and execute the tasks. The order and the why are covered in "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/9e6dbe7b?md=2dd5aee9e531477881de4712acc3595d","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"Using the Brains Together"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Add "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/c1d53bcf?md=9166b414941a45cb851448ef0c5ee7ac","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Ads Brain"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":" on top (once pages are ranking):"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Read the local SEO plan for <client> and identify the pages now ranking and converting.

Using my Ads Brain strategy patterns, tell me which of those winning pages to amplify with paid:
the platform, the campaign type, a starting budget, and the first test. Organic strategy first,
paid amplification only on proven winners."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"End every research prompt with a decision, not "tell me about it.""}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Voice-of-customer mining beats invented copy. Feed it real quotes."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Merge the Brains in one direction: Marketing Brain research, then Local SEO Brain plan, then skills execute."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The merge prompt reads both vaults and returns one client-ready plan, with each recommendation citing its source vault."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Add Ads Brain last, only on pages that already rank and convert."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=cda1296bf09b45969c19d8ee99617010","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Prompt Library & Cheat Sheets"},{"type":"text","text":" · Next: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=6d0449c86fa540f3a3b6403a1b9eab57","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"🎬 Video & Content Prompts"}]}]

modules.name: 4958db7f
modules.title: 🎬 Video & Content Prompts
modules.desc:
[v2][{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Package a video idea before you script it, write a scroll-stopping hook, draft a tight script, turn one long video into a batch of shorts, and generate or edit on-brand images."}]}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"alt":"","fileID":"","originalSrc":"","src":"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/AI-Marketing-Hub/classroom-assets@cfc5a1e99148d256bff96912f16ee28322523f56/chat-pl-video.gif","title":""}},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Package the title first, then hook, script, shorts, and on-brand images."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Packaging before script"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Walt's core rule: packaging before script, style before production. The title and thumbnail decide whether anyone watches, so you write those first and let them shape the script. Not the other way around. The full pipeline lives in "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/62de05f5?md=38534fb5dcd445b694fc3966c20c5392","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"🎬 Walt"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A winning long video is raw material for a week of shorts. These prompts run in any Claude session. Pair them with the Walt vault for performance-aware output."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Prompts"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Package the idea (titles + thumbnail before anything else):"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Video idea: <one-line idea>. Audience: <who>. Channel niche: <niche>.

Following "packaging before script": give me 8 title options ranked by curiosity without clickbait, plus a thumbnail concept (subject, text overlay of 3 words max, emotion) for the top 3 titles."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Write the hook (first 15 seconds):"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Video title: <chosen title>. Promise: <what the viewer gets>.

Write three opening-hook options for the first 15 seconds. Each must restate the promise, open a curiosity loop, and earn the next 10 seconds. No "hey guys, welcome back.""}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Draft a retention-aware script:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Title: <title>. Hook: <chosen hook>. Length target: <minutes>.

Write a script that delivers the promise in clear beats, reopens a curiosity loop every 60 to 90 seconds, and ends with one specific call to action. Mark where a pattern interrupt or B-roll should go."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Turn one long video into shorts:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Here's the transcript of my long video:

<paste transcript or timestamps of the best moments>

Find the <N> highest-retention standalone moments. For each, give me a 30 to 60 second short with its own hook, a vertical caption plan, and a title for that platform."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"On-brand images with "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/banana"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/banana"},{"type":"text","text":" is a creative-director skill. It rewards a brief, not a keyword dump. Name the subject, the style, the lighting, the framing, and the aspect ratio. Use "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/banana generate"},{"type":"text","text":" for new images and "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/banana edit"},{"type":"text","text":" to change an existing one without rerolling."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Generate a product shot:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/banana generate

A studio product shot of <product>, on a <clean / textured> background, soft top-down lighting, subtle shadow, centered, lots of negative space for text. Square 1:1, photorealistic, premium feel."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Generate ad creative with a message:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/banana generate

Scroll-stopping ad image for <product> aimed at <audience>. Show <the benefit, visually>. Bold but on-brand: <brand colors>. Leave the top third clear for a headline. Vertical 4:5 for feed."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Edit an existing image (change one thing):"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/banana edit <path-to-image>

Keep everything the same but <the one change, e.g. swap the background to a warm sunset, remove the text, change the shirt to navy>. Match the existing lighting and style."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Package first: write titles and thumbnails before the script (Walt's rule)."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The hook prompt kills "hey guys" intros and earns the next 10 seconds."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The script prompt builds in curiosity loops and one clear CTA."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The repurpose prompt mines one long video for a batch of shorts."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/banana generate"},{"type":"text","text":" rewards a creative brief. "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/banana edit"},{"type":"text","text":" changes one thing and keeps the rest."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=cda1296bf09b45969c19d8ee99617010","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Prompt Library & Cheat Sheets"},{"type":"text","text":" · Next: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=5aaf0d0bb6364e8383f3f5b62d6ba65c","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"🎯 Client & Agency Prompts"}]}]

modules.name: d4e416d7
modules.title: 🎯 Client & Agency Prompts
modules.desc:
[v2][{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Run one prompt for each step of the client flow and generate the deliverables that run an agency: a scoped plan, an audit-anchored proposal, a draft brief, a QA check, and a monthly report a client reads to the end."}]}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"alt":"","fileID":"","originalSrc":"","src":"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/AI-Marketing-Hub/classroom-assets@cfc5a1e99148d256bff96912f16ee28322523f56/chat-pl-client.gif","title":""}},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"One prompt per step, from a scoped plan to a report a CEO forwards."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"One prompt per step of the flow"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"You already learned the five-step flow: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Plan → Analyze → Draft → Edit → Improve"},{"type":"text","text":", then loop. These prompts slot into the steps. Anchor everything in real tool output. A proposal that opens with "your score is 61 and here are the three things costing you traffic" closes better than any pitch deck. The flow itself lives in "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/d2605b58?md=89d92e3fde4e4320acdfd6f9c1bbb583","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"The Client Delivery Flow"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Prompts"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Plan: scope the client:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Client: <company> in <industry>. They sell <product> to <audience>.

Help me scope this engagement. Give me: the one outcome that counts as a win in 90 days,
the 3 to 5 questions I must ask before I start, the access I need to request, and a one-line
definition of done. Keep it to half a page I can paste into the client folder notes."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Analyze: turn an audit into a 30-day plan:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"I ran the audit and got: score <X/100>, top findings <paste 3 findings>.
Here's the research opportunity: <paste keyword/competitor highlights or "none yet">.

Merge these into one prioritized 30-day plan for <client>: the fix-first list (broken things,
ranked by impact to effort), the pages or campaigns to build, and what to measure. Lead with
the fix-first list. This is what I'll present in the kickoff."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Proposal from a real audit:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"I ran an audit and got: score <X/100>, top findings <paste 3 findings>.

Write a one-page proposal for a <business type>. Open with the audit reality, scope the
engagement to fix the top findings, lay out a 90-day plan with milestones, and a clear monthly
price. Confident, no jargon, no overpromising."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Draft: brief the deliverable:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Deliverable: <e.g. 3 blog posts / a Google Ads restructure / 5 local pages>.
Client win it serves: <the 90-day outcome>. Voice: <how the client sounds>.

Write the brief I'll hand to /blog write or /ads: the exact topics or campaign structure,
the target keyword or audience for each, the angle, and the one success metric per piece."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Edit: QA before it ships:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Here's the deliverable: <paste draft or path>.

QA it on five checks and tell me what fails: (1) True, every stat and claim is real and
sourced. (2) On-brand, sounds like <client>, no hype or filler. (3) On-target, serves the
90-day win, not just word count. (4) Technically clean, links work and schema is valid.
(5) Reads well start to finish. List every issue with the exact line to fix. Nothing ships unread."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Improve: the monthly client report:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"This month I shipped: <list audits, posts, campaigns, fixes>.
Results: <metrics, e.g. rankings, traffic, leads, ROAS>. Baseline from month one: <paste>.

Write the monthly report for <client>. Structure: what we did, what it moved, what it means
for your business, what we're doing next month. Plain English a CEO can forward. Lead with the
single number that maps to their 90-day win. The "next month" section is next month's scope."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Cold email that books a call:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Prospect: <company> in <industry>. I noticed <specific observation about their site/ads>.

Write a 90-word cold email. Lead with the specific observation, name one concrete result we'd
target, and end with a low-friction ask for a 15-minute call. No flattery, no "I hope this finds you well.""}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Win-back email for a quiet client:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Client <name> has gone quiet. Last win we delivered: <result>. Current opportunity: <what you'd do next>.

Write a short, warm re-engagement email that reminds them of the last win and proposes one
specific next move. End with a single yes or no question."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"One prompt per step: Plan, Analyze, Draft, Edit, Improve. Same loop, every client."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Run the audit first. Feed its score and findings into the proposal and the 30-day plan."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The Edit prompt is the five-box QA. Nothing ships unread."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The monthly report frames activity as outcomes a CEO will forward, and the "next month" section becomes the next Plan."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Deliver reports as PDF via "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/ads report"},{"type":"text","text":" or the "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/seo google"},{"type":"text","text":" reporting flow."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=cda1296bf09b45969c19d8ee99617010","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Prompt Library & Cheat Sheets"},{"type":"text","text":" · Next: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=4b7733cecac1418487fb780f9944b0f9","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"🗂️  "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=493b2066c6c54f7b8a6f506754ad845a","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"bold"}],"text":"🛠️ Build Your Own Prompt"}]}]

modules.name: 917512d1
modules.title: 🛠️ Build Your Own Prompt
modules.desc:
[v2][{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Stop hunting for the perfect prompt and write your own. Four parts make any prompt reliable: role, context, task, format. Then you test it and save the winners into your own library."}]}]},{"type":"image","attrs":{"alt":"","fileID":"","originalSrc":"","src":"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/AI-Marketing-Hub/classroom-assets@cfc5a1e99148d256bff96912f16ee28322523f56/chat-pl-byo.gif","title":""}},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Four parts make any prompt reliable, then you save the winners."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The four parts"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Every strong prompt has four parts. Miss one and quality drops."}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Role."},{"type":"text","text":" Who Claude should be. "You are a senior PPC strategist.""}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Context."},{"type":"text","text":" Your business, your audience, your constraints."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Task."},{"type":"text","text":" The one thing you want done, with a verb. "Write 5 headlines.""}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Format."},{"type":"text","text":" Exactly how the answer should be shaped. A table. Five bullets. 90 words."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Format is the most-skipped and highest-leverage part. Skip it and you get mush."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Here it is, all four parts in one prompt:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Role: You are a conversion copywriter for B2B SaaS.
Context: We sell <product> to <audience>. Our edge is <differentiator>.
Task: Write 5 homepage hero headlines.
Format: A numbered list, each headline under 10 words, with a one-line reason for each."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Optional fifth part, constraints."},{"type":"text","text":" Once the four parts work, add a line for what to avoid. It sharpens the output fast."}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Constraints: No buzzwords, no "revolutionary", lead with the customer's outcome."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Test, then tighten"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A first draft rarely nails it. Don't start over. Tell Claude what was wrong and what to fix. One move:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"text"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"That output was <too long / too generic / off-voice>. Redo it, and this time <the specific fix>. Keep everything else."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":""That was too generic. Rewrite assuming the reader has already tried three competitors" fixes more than a full rewrite."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Save what works"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"When a prompt produces gold, save it. Keep one note (an Obsidian file works) with your best prompts and the brackets already marked. Next month you copy, swap, run. Your own private library that beats any list someone else wrote. That's the same pattern this whole course is built on."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Four parts: Role, Context, Task, Format. Every part matters."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Format is the most-skipped and highest-leverage line."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Add a Constraints line once the four parts work, to say what to avoid."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Improve by telling Claude what was wrong, not by starting over."}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Save winning prompts in one note with brackets marked. Build your own library."}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=5aaf0d0bb6364e8383f3f5b62d6ba65c","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}},{"type":"italic"}],"text":"🎯 Client & Agency Prompts"},{"type":"text","text":" · Next: "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"class":"link","href":"https://www.skool.com/ai-marketing-hub-pro/classroom/2afc71bf?md=af828c1dd05c40aeb37ff7fe01730f13","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","target":"_blank"}}],"text":"📦 Install by Prompt + First-Run Playbooks"}]}]
